past_24_hours.description_zh: 一个蜂群思维交流平台

past_24_hours.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 基于Claude Code的AI驱动求职应用框架。Fork它，填写你的个人资料，让Claude评估工作、定制简历、撰写求职信，并为你准备面试。

past_24_hours.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 开源AI语音工作室。克隆、听写、创作。

past_24_hours.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 面向MCP和CLI的本地优先代码智能图谱。构建代码库的持久映射，使AI编码工具只读取关键内容，在代码审查和大型仓库工作流中实现基准化的上下文缩减。

past_24_hours.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 全球首个开源、智能体驱动的视频制作系统。12条流水线、52个工具、500多项智能体技能。将你的AI编码助手转变为完整的视频制作工作室。

past_24_hours.description: SkillOpt is a text-space optimizer that trains reusable natural-language skills for frozen LLM agents through trajectory-driven edits, validation-gated updates, and deployable best_skill.md artifacts.
past_24_hours.description_zh: SkillOpt是一个文本空间优化器，通过轨迹驱动的编辑、验证门控更新和可部署的best_skill.md工件，为冻结的LLM智能体训练可重用的自然语言技能。

past_24_hours.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 永不停歇的编码。免费AI网关：一个端点，160多个提供商（50多个免费），连接Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Cline和Copilot到免费的Claude/GPT/Gemini。RTK+Caveman堆叠压缩节省15-95%的令牌，智能自动回退，MCP/A2A，多模态API，桌面/PWA。

past_24_hours.description: An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready
past_24_hours.description_zh: 一个完全可定制且支持智能体的开源设计系统

past_24_hours.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 学习它。构建它。为他人交付它。

past_24_hours.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
past_24_hours.description_zh: Orca是用于管理并行智能体群的ADE。使用你自己的订阅运行任何编码智能体。可在桌面和移动端使用。

past_week.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
past_week.description_zh: Orca 是用于管理并行代理集群的 ADE。使用您自己的订阅运行任何编码代理。可在桌面和移动设备上使用。

past_week.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
past_week.description_zh: 永不停歇的编码。免费 AI 网关：一个端点，160+ 提供商（50+ 免费），连接 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Cline 和 Copilot 到免费的 Claude/GPT/Gemini。RTK+Caveman 堆叠压缩节省 15-95% 的令牌，智能自动回退，MCP/A2A，多模态 API，桌面/PWA。

past_week.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
past_week.description_zh: 驻留在终端中的代理多路复用器。

past_week.description: Run GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) on a 25GB-RAM consumer machine — pure C, zero deps, experts streamed from disk. Tiny engine, immense model. 🐦
past_week.description_zh: 在 25GB 内存的消费级机器上运行 GLM-5.2（744B MoE）——纯 C 语言，零依赖，专家流式从磁盘加载。微型引擎，庞大模型。🐦

past_week.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.
past_week.description_zh: 基于 Claude Code 的 AI 驱动求职申请框架。Fork 它，填写您的个人资料，让 Claude 评估工作、定制简历、撰写求职信并为您准备面试。

past_week.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
past_week.description_zh: 开源 AI 语音工作室。克隆、听写、创作。

past_month.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
past_month.description_zh: 全球首个开源、智能体视频制作系统。12条流水线，52个工具，500+智能体技能。将你的AI编码助手转变为完整的视频制作工作室。

past_month.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
past_month.description_zh: 高性能代码智能MCP服务器。将代码库索引为持久化知识图谱——平均仓库毫秒级处理。支持158种语言，亚毫秒查询，减少99%的令牌。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖。

past_month.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
past_month.description_zh: 开源AI渗透测试工具，用于发现并修复你的应用漏洞。

past_month.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
past_month.description_zh: 一种格式规范，用于向编码智能体描述视觉标识。DESIGN.md为智能体提供对设计系统的持久化、结构化理解。

past_month.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
past_month.description_zh: 无限OCR工作：欢迎一次性长视野解析时代。

past_month.description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。  LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.

AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code / Codex 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built for Claude Code / Codex. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
OpenWiki is a CLI that writes and maintains agent documentation for your codebase.
past_month.description_zh: OpenWiki是一个CLI工具，用于为你的代码库编写和维护智能体文档。

past_month.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
past_month.description_zh: Orca是用于管理并行智能体集群的ADE。使用你自己的订阅运行任何编码智能体。可在桌面和移动端使用。

past_month.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
past_month.description_zh: 使用AI编码智能体，一条命令克隆任何网站。

past_year.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
past_year.description_zh: 您专属的个人AI助手。任何操作系统。任何平台。龙虾之道。🦞

past_year.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
past_year.description_zh: 一个行之有效的智能体技能框架与软件开发方法论。

past_year.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
past_year.description_zh: 智能体性能优化系统。为Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等提供技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发支持。

past_year.description: The agent that grows with you
past_year.description_zh: 与您一同成长的智能体

past_year.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
past_year.description_zh: 一个单一的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改善Claude Code的行为，源自Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察。

past_year.description: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
past_year.description_zh: 一个由智能体管理的博物馆展品，使用Rust语言和Gajae-Code / LazyCodex构建——全程无需人工干预开发与维护。

past_year.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .agents directory.
past_year.description_zh: 面向真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的.agents目录。

past_year.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
past_year.description_zh: 触手可及的完整AI代理机构——从前端专家到Reddit社区达人，从趣味注入者到现实检验者。每个智能体都是拥有个性、流程和可交付成果的领域专家。

past_year.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
past_year.description_zh: 使用Garry Tan的精确Claude Code配置：23个定制化工具，分别担任CEO、设计师、工程经理、发布经理、文档工程师和QA角色。

all_time.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
all_time.description_zh: 通过从零开始重建你喜爱的技术来掌握编程。

all_time.description: 😎 Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics
all_time.description_zh: 😎 关于各种有趣主题的精彩列表

all_time.description_zh: freeCodeCamp.org 的开源代码库和课程。免费学习数学、编程和计算机科学。

all_time.description_zh: 免费 API 的集合列表

all_time.description_zh: 你自己的个人 AI 助手。任何操作系统。任何平台。龙虾风格。🦞

all_time.description_zh: 交互式路线图、指南和其他教育内容，帮助开发者职业成长。

all_time.description: Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview.  Includes Anki flashcards.
all_time.description_zh: 学习如何设计大规模系统。为系统设计面试做准备。包含 Anki 闪卡。

all_time.description_zh: 成为软件工程师的完整计算机科学学习计划。
